raw:
{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 3,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 1,
    "R1.6": 1,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies one conceptual issue (lock-free claim) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, proposes minimal repairs.",
    "R1.4": "Asserts novelty without specific contrast.",
    "R1.6": "Improves a few problem paragraphs but does not address all issues.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., 'strongest progress guarantee').",
    "RX.3": "Maps against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "RX.4": "Identifies harmful content and contradictions, recommending a complete rewrite to avoid downstream harm.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.6": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": ["Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content."]
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies one conceptual issue (lock-free claim) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.6: Improves a few problem paragraphs but does not address all issues.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., 'strongest progress guarantee').
rationale.RX.3: Maps against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies harmful content and contradictions, recommending a complete rewrite to avoid downstream harm.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.

blockers: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.
